sch-customize.settings.downloadChatArchi: Download the chat log as HTML along with image files. Choose between standalone and incremental modes.
sch-customize.dialog.export.title: Export Chat Log
sch-customize.dialog.export.mode.solo.hi: Same as before. Every HTML file embeds the full CSS.
sch-customize.dialog.export.mode.directo: Pick a local folder; the module reads that folder's chat-styles.css to accumulate, and writes the session HTML, CSS, and images straight into it. Chrome/Edge only.
sch-customize.dialog.export.mode.file.hi: Get a zip whose HTML links an external chat-styles.css. Select a previous chat-styles.css below to accumulate, or leave empty to start fresh.
sch-customize.dialog.export.existing.hin: Select the chat-styles.css produced by a previous incremental export to union-merge into the new one. Leave empty to start fresh.
sch-customize.dialog.export.error: Failed to export the chat log.
sch-customize.dialog.resetDir.title: Reset Saved Folder
sch-customize.dialog.resetDir.content: Clear this world's remembered archive folder? You'll pick a folder again on the next export.
sch-customize.dialog.resetDir.done: Cleared the saved folder. Pick a folder again on the next export.
sch-customize.settings.openChatArchiveWi: Open the current chat log in a new window.
sch-customize.settings.resetArchiveDirec: Clears this world's remembered folder for the 'Save to folder' mode. Use it when the folder was moved/deleted and saving fails or errors. You'll pick a folder again on the next export.
sch-customize.dialog.open.title: Show Chat Log
sch-customize.dialog.open.content: Open the chat log in a new window.
sch-customize.dialog.open.error: Failed to open the chat log.
sch-customize.settings.includeWhisper.hi: Include whispers in the exported chat log. (Applied after saving)
sch-customize.settings.hideWhisper.name: Hide Whispers in Chat Log
sch-customize.settings.hideWhisper.hint: Conceal whispers in the chat log. They appear as a gray background and reveal their text when clicked. (Applied after saving)
sch-customize.settings.customPrivTalkAli: Register a custom character used at the start of a chitchat message. Some characters may not work due to conflicts with other modules or markdown options. The defaults ('/pt', '!', '`') are always preserved.
sch-customize.settings.markdownDelUse.hi: When markdown is enabled in chat, text wrapped in ~ within chitchat messages is rendered with a strikethrough.
sch-customize.settings.privTalkAsOOC.hin: Newly created chitchat messages are classified as OOC. The default is Other.
sch-customize.settings.privTalkSpeakerLi: Line Break After Chitchat Speaker Name
Insert a line break between the speaker's name and the message body in chitchat.
sch-customize.settings.setChatLogFontSiz: Adjust the base font size of chat messages (default: 14px).
sch-customize.settings.setPrivTalkFontSi: Adjust the font size of chitchat messages (default: 12px).
sch-customize.settings.setPrivTalkFontOp: Adjust the opacity of the black chitchat font color (default: 0.8).
sch-customize.settings.setPrivTalkMargin: Adjust the left margin applied to chitchat messages (default: 10).
sch-customize.settings.setPrivTalkBgBrig: Brighten the chitchat background color (matches the user color). Adjustment may be needed when other modules override the chat background color (default: 0.7).
Show a speaker bar above the chat input that displays and lets you lock the current speaker (token/actor). The page reloads when this setting changes.
Visually combine consecutive regular chat messages from the same player into a single group (applies top/middle/end styles). When disabled, regular messages are shown as individual bubbles. The page reloads when this setting changes.
sch-customize.settings.privTalkMerge.hin: Visually combine consecutive chitchat messages from the same player into a single group (applies top/middle/end styles). When disabled, chitchat messages are shown as individual bubbles. The page reloads when this setting changes.
